title: DevBase - Component Library
desc: This library contains the required components to build a solid back-office tool, currently used for 7 digital products within DevBase. The minimalistic design and focus towards readability and accessibility makes the interface very scaleable.
subdesc: Initially built with simple ReactJS and CSS, it has evolved towards strict typing with typescript and scaleable design with Tailwind using the most optimal loading techniques react has to offer.

title: Platato - Food ordering system
desc: Platato is an application that enables restaurants to easily set up an online and in-store ordering system through multiple channels (phone, self-service kiosks, and desktop devices). The service improves order management efficiency while increasing visibility.
subdesc: This showcase website was made under Vue 3 using nuxt, typescript and tailwind and was entirely designed by me.

title: FinWork - Scholar Submissions & Internship
desc: FinWork serves as a bridge between the teacher and the student, teacher can create tasks and evaluate the submissions of the student and follow-up on their internship tasks. It was based on an outdated tool used by my high school.
subdesc: This project has been achieved using Laravel as a backend framework and VueJS as the frontend one. The technical challenge lies in the building up and displaying of the task forms created by the teacher.

title: Sciensano - Allergy Chart Converter
desc: This platform allowed scientist within sciensano to convert their data of air allergies from a CSV format to a visual SVG generated graph. Once generated, they can be integrated into any website through a secured API key.
subdesc: This task was assigned to me during my internship, I built the front platform using VueJS and the chart conversion itself was done through a NodeJS. Both technologies were wrapped into AdonisJS
